mutation: composite: prize-collecting pickup-delivery TSP with precedence -- choose which tasks to serve (skip => spoilage penalty) AND the visiting order of a single depot-to-depot tour, minimizing route_length + sum of skip penalties
title: Foraging Route of the Golden Apiary
strategies: serve all tasks in index order (reference baseline)
nearest-neighbour construction over task pickups, serve all
nearest-neighbour + relocate/or-opt local search on task order
relocate local search plus profitable-drop pass (skip tasks whose detour exceeds their penalty)
